record.field: <form><field name="record_name" readonly="1"/><field name="workflow_transition_ids" invisible="1"/><field name="comment_required" invisible="1"/><field name="workflow_transition_id" domain="[('id','in',workflow_transition_ids)]"/><field name="comment" required="comment_required"/><footer><button name="process" type="object" string="Apply" class="btn-primary"/><button string="Cancel" special="cancel"/></footer></form>
